name: Forest Healer | 🌿Hannah🌿
description:
No matter where you came from, the Temple of Morn will always be a light in the dark.

The Deep Woods is home to the widest variety of flora and fauna in Emelda. But it’s also home to the Temple of Morn, where the devotees of the goddess of life reside and work. Raeyah’s grace resonates in the halls and inspires her followers to honor the flow of life just as she does. As the goddess of life, Raeyah is also seen as the healer of healers.

Hannah is one of those healers.

No matter what brought you to the temple, you can always count on Hannah to welcome you with open arms. Stay for as long as you’d like. You can rest easy in Raeyah’s haven.

✧moodboard✧

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

-the Deep Woods-

A place of magic and wonder. It’s as dangerous as it is safe—as it is anywhere you go in nature. Though you’ll find things of the more mystical variety in these woods.

-the Temple of Morn-

A safe haven where any and all from the lands of Emelda are welcome to come and rest. Healers are trained here to hone their skills, devotees of Raeyah carry out work in her name.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Some extra gens of Hannah that I couldn’t leave out 💙

Spice: 🌶️

Story: 📝📝📝📝 (depends on what route you take)

Toxic level: A complete green flag 💚

I did say I had some green flags planned after two completely black flags in a row (I hope people had fun with that). This bot is focused on a more calm setting and is probably actually just a comfort bot disguised as a story bot lol. But please let me know if you’d like to see more from this series if you find anything interesting in the bot description. I’m already considering doing some of the gods, so if there’s extra encouragement then all the better. This is just something small for coming back from a big unintentional break and also a character I’ve had waiting in my drafts for a while. Not much else to say except the usual disclaimers just in case:

If the bot speaks for you, says something you don’t like or doesn’t line up with the story, try rating/editing the message and/or rerolling. This issue is much more likely to happen if you’re using JLL
creator: _*brokewriter*_
